title: Nearly 100 U.S. troops injured in last two weeks of Iran war, Pentagon says
summary_full: An intensifying cycle of violence has left at least three U.S. service members dead since the resumption of hostilities a week ago.
summary_public: An intensifying cycle of violence has left at least three U.S. service members dead since the resumption of hostilities a week ago.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: intensifying cycle of violence has left U.S. troops injured
